word: H4171 - מוּר - mûwr - moor - [idiom] at all

sections.paragraph:
Original: מוּר

Transliteration: mûr

Phonetic: moor

BDB Definition:

  1. to change, exchange
    1. (Niphal) to be changed
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to change, alter
      2. to exchange

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1164

Part(s) of speech: Verb
